summary: Phone Invite Join Flow testing complete. All features verified: Backend returns 403 with phone_verification_required when user doesn't have matching verified phone, Backend returns invite_type/buyer_phone/seller_phone in successful response, Frontend shows inline phone verification UI with masked phone and transaction preview, Buyer/Seller Information cards show phone numbers, PARTIES sidebar shows 'via phone' indicator.

minor.issue: Health check endpoint doesn't exist (not critical)

issues: Minor: validateDOMNesting warning in console - tr/span nesting issue in table component

passed_tests: ✅ BACKEND: GET /api/transactions/{id} returns 403 with phone_verification_required type when user doesn't have matching verified phone
✅ BACKEND: 403 response includes invited_phone_masked, invite_type, transaction_id, item_description, item_price
✅ BACKEND: GET /api/transactions/{id} returns invite_type field in successful response
✅ BACKEND: GET /api/transactions/{id} returns buyer_phone and seller_phone fields
✅ BACKEND: POST /api/verification/phone/send-otp endpoint exists and accessible
✅ BACKEND: POST /api/verification/phone/verify-otp endpoint exists and accessible
✅ FRONTEND: Inline phone verification UI appears when 403 phone_verification_required is returned
✅ FRONTEND: Phone verification UI shows 'Verify Your Phone Number' heading
✅ FRONTEND: Phone verification UI shows masked invited phone number (+27•••2758)
✅ FRONTEND: Transaction preview shows item description (Headset) and amount (R 799.99)
✅ FRONTEND: Phone input field with data-testid='phone-input' present
✅ FRONTEND: 'Send Verification Code' button with data-testid='send-otp-btn' present
✅ FRONTEND: 'Back to My Transactions' button present
✅ FRONTEND: Buyer Information card shows buyer name and email
✅ FRONTEND: Seller Information card shows seller name and phone number (+27791782758)
✅ FRONTEND: PARTIES sidebar shows 'via phone' indicator for phone-based invites

critical_code_review_comments.comment: Added invite_type field to Transaction model to ensure it's included in API responses (was being dropped due to extra='ignore')
Lines 637-742: get_transaction correctly handles phone access logic and returns structured 403 response with phone_verification_required type
Lines 108-195: fetchData correctly handles structured 403 response and sets phoneVerificationContext state
Lines 730-910: needsPhoneVerification inline UI correctly displays masked phone, transaction preview, and OTP input
Lines 1714-1780: Buyer/Seller Information cards correctly display phone numbers when available
Lines 2111-2132: PARTIES sidebar correctly shows 'via phone' indicator for phone-based invites

seed_data_creation: None - used existing phone-based transaction txn_adcfbcad4882
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone Invite Join Flow testing complete. Key verifications: (1) Backend returns structured 403 response with type='phone_verification_required' including masked phone, item description, and price, (2) Frontend correctly handles this response and shows inline OTP verification UI, (3) Transaction detail page shows phone numbers in Buyer/Seller Information cards, (4) PARTIES sidebar shows 'via phone' indicator. Fixed: Added invite_type field to Transaction model in /app/backend/models/transaction.py to ensure it's included in API responses.
rca_of_the_issue: The invite_type field was being set in the backend route (line 740) but was being dropped when converting to the Transaction model because the model had extra='ignore' and invite_type was not defined as a field. Fixed by adding invite_type: Optional[str] = None to the Transaction model.
